title: brickellia coixtlahuaca
intro: Brickellia coixtlahuaca, also known as Coixtlahuaca, is a flowering plant species in the mint family Lamiaceae, native to Mexico. Its leaves and flowers are used in traditional medicine, and it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Brickellia coixtlahuaca include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, and can also be dried and used in herbal blends.
